text: Entering from the bright, sterile corridor into this colorful and stimulating room, I feel a sudden shift from emptiness to energy. The wall, inviting inquiry about research and development, incites curiosity and a faint sense of anticipation. I notice how the cold, technical hallway gives way to this dynamic, idea-filled environment — it feels like moving from a holding space into the heart of creative activity. I'm both intrigued and slightly overwhelmed, eager to explore what innovations and meanings are displayed here.
